lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in mint condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Several mechanical and electrical systems are currently non-functional and require repair.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear consistent with age. The interior is clean and well-maintained. All mechanical systems are fully operational.

This vehicle is in truly impeccable, showroom-quality condition. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep factory shine and absolutely no scratches, dents, or chips. Inside, the leather upholstery remains supple and unmarked, still retaining that new-car scent. Mechanically, it is perfect; all maintenance is up to date, the engine runs silently, and every feature—from the advanced infotainment system to the climate control—operates exactly as it should. It has been garage-kept and meticulously cared for, making it an ideal find for a buyer looking for a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just left the dealership.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It will require significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The exterior has extensive rust on the wheel wells and rocker panels, along with several large dents and peeling clear coat. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with multiple tears and a lingering musty odor. Mechanically, the engine runs but idles roughly, and the transmission shifts harshly. This car is best suited for a buyer looking for a major project or a source for spare parts.

Experience automotive excellence with this incredible find! This car is in absolute mint condition, appearing as if it just left the showroom. Meticulously cared for and truly flawless inside and out, it offers a pristine driving experience that is second to none. Don't miss out on this stunning, like-new beauty!

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, characterized by its mechanical integrity and well-preserved aesthetic. Having undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our professional standards, this model offers a seamless blend of performance and reliability. It stands as a testament to conscientious ownership and remains a premier selection for those seeking a sophisticated and dependable driving experience.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and she’s been absolute gold to drive. 🚗✨ It’s in really solid shape—super reliable and has been well-loved over the years. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this beauty is ready to go! I’ve taken great care of it, so you’re getting a fantastic ride at a fair price. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to a good home!

Available is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54B32 power unit. This high-revving naturally aspirated inline-six benefits from recent VANOS servicing and a valve adjustment to ensure optimal timing and compression. The chassis maintains its structural integrity with documented rear subframe reinforcement, paired with a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Suspension geometry remains true with refreshed bushings and dampers, while the staggered alloys are wrapped in high-performance rubber. Cosmetically honest with minor patina reflective of its mileage, this example provides a visceral mechanical connection and linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Smooth engine. Tidy interior. Ready to drive.

This meticulously maintained sedan offers a perfect blend of performance and reliability. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful, low-mileage ownership. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and clean, while all onboard electronics, navigation, and dual-zone climate control systems function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, backed by a comprehensive service history and a very recent multi-point inspection. The tires have significant tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. It is a solid, road-ready vehicle that has been garage-kept and remains smoke-free, offering a premium driving experience that feels both tight and responsive.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and aesthetic integrity. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical reliability and interior comfort. An ideal selection for the discerning driver seeking a balanced combination of proven endurance and sophisticated presentation.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating steadfast mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it delivers a refined driving experience that validates its superior upkeep. We invite you to experience its sophisticated performance and exceptional value firsthand.

Hi! I'm parting with my trusty car, and she's been absolutely wonderful to own. She's in great shape, runs like a charm, and has been super well-maintained. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this ride is ready for its next adventure with you. Come see for yourself why I've loved this car so much!

Offered is a mechanically robust 2008 Porsche 911 Carrera (997.1) featuring the 3.6L flat-six boxer engine paired with a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle. This driver’s example benefits from a documented IMS bearing retrofit and a recently replaced Rear Main Seal (RMS), ensuring the M97 powerplant remains oil-tight and reliable. The chassis remains taut, utilizing Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) to modulate damping across the multi-link rear geometry. Braking performance is sharp, delivered via four-piston monoblock calipers over cross-drilled rotors. While the finish shows minor road-going patina consistent with its age, the aerodynamic profile and structural integrity are uncompromised. This is a focused performance machine with a linear power band and exceptional communicative steering, ready for the next enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Regularly serviced. Clean title.

Presenting a well-cared-for vehicle that strikes the ideal balance between performance and value. The exterior finish remains vibrant, showing only the slight, expected character marks of a car that has been enjoyed responsibly. Under the hood, the engine is responsive and quiet, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule. The interior provides a serene environment, with plush seating surfaces and a dashboard that remains free of cracks or fading. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, operates flawlessly. This car has been smoke-free and garage-kept, ensuring it remains in commendable shape for its next owner. It drives straight and true, offering a confident feel on both city streets and highways.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies both mechanical integrity and sophisticated performance. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this automobile offers a reliable and refined driving experience. Its current condition reflects a consistent history of professional care, ensuring it meets the exacting standards of our discerning clientele.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been curated for the professional who demands both reliability and refinement. It exhibits consistent mechanical excellence and a well-preserved interior, reflecting a history of diligent maintenance and responsible ownership. This offering represents a superior acquisition for those seeking an elevated driving experience and proven performance.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty car and it's been such a fantastic ride. It's in really solid condition and has been well-maintained, so it's ready to hit the road with its next owner right away! It drives smoothly and looks great, making it the perfect reliable companion for your daily commutes or fun weekend getaways. You're going to love how it handles—come check it out!

This driver-focused example features a high-revving, naturally aspirated powerplant with an exceptional power-to-weight ratio. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise short-throw manual gearbox and a mechanical limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque vectoring through the apex. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive cooling system refresh and a high-pressure VANOS service to maintain variable valve timing integrity. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from upgraded polyurethane bushings and monotube dampers that provide communicative feedback through the rack-and-pinion steering. While displaying minor cosmetic patina consistent with spirited use, the mechanical fundamentals—including compression across all cylinders and subframe rigidity—are excellent. A turn-key performance machine for the discerning enthusiast.
Well-maintained used car. Good condition. Routine service completed. Clean title.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-maintained, reliable driver. The exterior maintains a brilliant luster, showing only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, with all premium features and electronics functioning exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car has been serviced strictly according to schedule, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that delivers a confident driving experience. It comes complete with a documented service history, two sets of keys, and tires with plenty of life remaining. This is a solid, honest car that balances performance with everyday practicality.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that balances refined performance with exceptional value. This offering showcases a well-preserved exterior and a sophisticated interior, reflecting a history of responsible ownership and consistent mechanical care. Engineered for longevity and comfort, it represents a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience without compromise.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a balanced synergy of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this automobile retains its mechanical excellence and structural integrity. It serves as an ideal acquisition for the professional seeking a dependable, high-caliber transport solution that has been curated with care. Secure this exceptional offering today.

Hi everyone! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape, super dependable, and looking for its next adventure! If you're looking for something that's been well-cared for and is ready to hit the road today, this is definitely the one for you. It runs like a dream and is ready for a new home. Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis remains taut with a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings, while the variable M differential lock ensures optimal torque distribution. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and valve adjustment, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain operates with factory precision. Equipped with a sport-tuned suspension and cross-drilled rotors, this example offers a visceral, analog driving experience that modern iterations struggle to replicate.
Used vehicle. Reliable performance. Well-maintained interior and exterior. Clean title. Ready for immediate use.

This vehicle is a prime example of well-maintained quality, offering a smooth and reliable driving experience. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean, featuring high-quality materials that have been preserved with regular detailing; all power features, climate control, and infotainment systems are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is sound, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule with recent fluid services and a comprehensive multi-point inspection already completed. It handles beautifully on both city streets and highways, making it a dependable choice for a discerning buyer who values mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has undergone a rigorous inspection process to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a superior balance of sophistication and value, it remains an ideal choice for the discerning driver who prioritizes long-term durability and consistent road manners.
